name: codex-science
description: An auditable, reproducible scientific research workbench for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Auditable research from question to artifact
interface.longDescription: Coordinate evidence-led literature research, dataset lineage, preregistered experiments, approval-aware compute, reproducible scientific artifacts, independent review, study forks, and final research packets.
defaultPrompt: Turn my research question into an auditable end-to-end study.
Build a source-to-claim literature synthesis with disconfirming evidence.
Independently audit this study and produce a reproducible handoff packet.
